From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This article is about the personal statistic. For the rink area, see [The point (ice hockey)](/wiki/The_point_(ice_hockey) "The point (ice hockey)"). For the team statistic, see [Group tournament ranking system § Ice hockey](/wiki/Group_tournament_ranking_system#Ice_hockey "Group tournament ranking system").

| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Point_(ice_hockey) "Special:EditPage/Point (ice hockey)") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["Point" ice hockey](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Point%22+ice+hockey) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Point%22+ice+hockey+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Point%22+ice+hockey&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Point%22+ice+hockey+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Point%22+ice+hockey) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Point%22+ice+hockey&acc=on&wc=on) *(January 2023)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

Ice hockey statistic summing a player's goals and assists

In [ice hockey](/wiki/Ice_hockey "Ice hockey"), a player is credited with one **point** for either a [goal](/wiki/Goal_(ice_hockey) "Goal (ice hockey)") or an [assist](/wiki/Assist_(ice_hockey) "Assist (ice hockey)").

The total number of goals plus assists equals total points. In the [National Hockey League](/wiki/National_Hockey_League "National Hockey League") (NHL), the [Art Ross Trophy](/wiki/Art_Ross_Trophy "Art Ross Trophy") is awarded to the player who leads the league in points at the end of the regular season.
